use_cases: Creating spinning or morphing sphere animations by animating SVG path data
Building animated decorative elements for hero sections or landing pages
Generating fluid shape transformations with customizable duration and easing
Adding subtle animated visuals without heavy dependencies
ai_summary: A lightweight SVG animation primitive that morphs between path definitions using the native SVG animate element. Accepts custom frame values as semicolon-separated path data, enabling spinning sphere and organic shape transition effects. Supports configurable duration, colors, and infinite looping for fluid visual displays.
